testTarget.reason: JapanesePhrase is the central component for ALL Japanese text display (kanji, furigana, romaji, translation). It appears across every practice mode but has zero test coverage. Critical for consistent reading experience.

refactorCandidate.reason: All previously flagged refactor candidates (VoiceRecorder, LessonMode, GrammarMode, etc.) have been significantly reduced in size. Largest component is ListeningMode.tsx at 607 lines — within acceptable range.

notes: Frontend: 85 tests. Backend: 35 tests. All 3 critical hooks (useAudioPlayer, useFurigana, useChatSession) are covered. AudioPlayer component is also covered. JapanesePhrase is the first uncovered critical component in priority order.
testNote: Original target (JapanesePhrase) already had 26 passing tests. Wrote test for secondary component LegendPanel instead.
refactorNote: No refactor candidate flagged. Largest component (ListeningMode.tsx at 607 lines) is within acceptable range.
